title: Cobbled Battle Watcher
description: Battle watcher HUD for Cobblemon! Get live battle insights in multiplayer!
body:
# Pebble's Cobbled Battle Watcher

Get insights such as active Pokemon, HP, level, held items and status effects. Also shows how many Pokemon are left in the party without giving away too much.

# Commands
`/observebattle <playername>`: Spectate a battle.
